summary: Split the rust-diffforge React app shell and Tauri host into a small set of domain files while preserving existing desktop behavior.

review_items.summary: Move App.jsx responsibilities into simplified app, agents, terminal, files, vault, audio, and MCP frontend modules while keeping App.jsx as the root composer.

Move lib.rs responsibilities into simplified api, terminal, workspace file, audio, platform, process, and validation Rust modules while keeping lib.rs as the Tauri setup and command registration spine.
Desktop auth startup, deep-link handling, session validation, paid-plan gating, logout, and opener allowlist behavior remain unchanged.
Terminal pane ids, PTY spawn/despawn behavior, resize behavior, telemetry event names, local CLI launch behavior, and terminal command names remain unchanged.
The VS Code-like files explorer, read-only file bridge, highlighting, layout persistence, git status, and bounded diff behavior remain unchanged.
Whisper model status/download, audio widget routing, local transcription, focused text insertion, and audio data handling remain unchanged.
The local MCP registry remains localStorage-backed configuration only and does not start MCP processes or expose MCPs to local CLI sessions.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or hosted API data access change is required.

patches.summary: Reduce App.jsx to a root composer that imports the extracted frontend domain modules.
Add the extracted app shell and shared styled-components module.
Add terminal pane, resize, lifecycle, and telemetry modules used by the Agents workspace surface.
Add the Agents workspace rail surface that composes terminal primitives without owning terminal internals.
Add files workspace, explorer pane, preview pane, and file helper modules.
Add the placeholder Vault workspace view.
Add audio setup, widget, and capture helper modules.
Add MCP workspace view and local MCP storage/model helpers.
Reduce lib.rs to Tauri builder, plugin setup, state setup, and command registration.
Move backend health, desktop auth, workspace API, and HTTP helpers.
Move PTY terminal state, pool, open, write, resize, close, and telemetry behavior.
Move local Codex/Claude CLI detection, install, login, update, and terminal launch helpers.
Move workspace root validation, directory listing, file read, git status, and bounded diff behavior.
Move Whisper model, audio widget, local transcription, and text insertion command behavior.
Move platform-specific shell, path, window icon, and text insertion helpers.
Move bounded process execution helpers shared by terminal CLI, workspace files, and audio.

compatibility.notes: This is a local code organization change. Tauri command names, invoke payloads, storage keys, event names, filesystem safety checks, auth boundaries, and local audio data handling remain unchanged.

tests.summary: Validate the React WebView bundle after frontend imports are split.
Validate Tauri commands and Rust module boundaries.
